MenuSuggestions.title: Recommended Meals
MenuSuggestions.note_pizza: Crispy bread topped with tomato paste, yellow cheese and toppings of your choice.
MenuSuggestions.note_nudels: Noodles mixed with vegetables and meat stir-fried in a sweet sauce
MenuSuggestions.note_pancake: Soft fried pancakes with maple or chocolate sauce
MenuSuggestions.note_couscous_with_vegetables: A classic Moroccan dish that no one dislikes
MenuSuggestions.note_spring_chicken: Chicken in sweet and sour sauce
MenuSuggestions.note_Spaghetti Carbonara: Classic Italian pasta with eggs, cheese, pancetta, and pepper
MenuSuggestions.note_Beef Stroganoff: Romaine lettuce with croutons, Parmesan cheese, and Caesar dressing
MenuSuggestions.note_Caesar Salad: Romaine lettuce with croutons, Parmesan cheese, and Caesar dressing
MenuSuggestions.note_Miso Soup: Traditional Japanese soup with tofu, seaweed, and miso paste
MenuSuggestions.note_Falafel Wrap: Fried chickpea balls wrapped in pita with salad and tahini sauce
MenuSuggestions.note_Chocolate Lava Cake: Warm chocolate cake with a gooey melted center
MenuSuggestions.note_Margherita Pizza: Pizza topped with tomato, mozzarella, and fresh basil
